title: empleurum serrulatum var. ensatum
intro: Empleurum serrulatum var. ensatum, also known as Chinese angelica or Angelica keiskei, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, specifically in China, Japan, and Korea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Empleurum serrulatum var. ensatum include reducing fever and relieving symptoms of colds and flu, as well as promoting digestion and reducing menstrual cramps. Empleurum serrulatum var. ensatum is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
